channel.title: Notes on Qianqian Shan
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Qianqian Shan

item.title: DDIA - Data Models and Query Languages
item.description: Overview Relational Model vs Document Model Query Languages for Data Graph-like Data Models 1 Overview Data models are probably the most important part of devloping software for their profound effect on not only how the software is written, but also on how we thinkg about the problem that we are solving. Each layer of the applications is built by one data model on top of another, and each layer hides the complexity of the layers below it by providing a clean data model (abstraction), which allows different groups of people to work together effectively.

item.title: DDIA - Reliable Scalable and Maintainable Applications
item.description: Overview Reliability 2.1 Hardware Faults 2.2 Software Errors 2.3 Human Errors Scalability Maintainability 1 Overview With more applications are data-intensive (in terms of the amount of data, complexity of data, and the speed at which the data is changing), it is important to figure out which tools and which approaches are the most appropriate for the tasks, and it can be hard to combine tools when a single tool alone is not enough.

item.title: A/B Testing
item.description: Table of contents Overview Policy and Ethics for Experiments Choosing and Characterizing Metrics Designing of Experiment Analyzing Results Resources Overview Choose a metric Review statistics Design Analyze 0 - Definition of A/B testing A general methodology used online when you want to test a new product or a feature using control/experiment sets of users. 1 - A/B testing can do A/B testing can do a wide variety of things such as

item.title: Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments - Metrics
item.description: Table of contents Introduction Metrics taxonomy Metrics formulation Metrics evaluation Metrics evolvement Introduction Randomized online controlled experiments have been considered as the gold standard for estabilishing causality, which is the key to bridge a new feature we’d like to launch and its business impact, especially for the customer-facing websites and applications in the Internet world. Good metrics are the key to track progress toward the final goals and data-driven decisions.
